name: Dak's Sourdough Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Better for Bread white flour
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all the ingredients in the order listed.
2. Select either the "white" or "oat/French" bread setting on your machine.
3. Set the brown control to the darkest setting and push start.
4. If you are at 2,500-foot altitude, remove 1/4 cup (2 tablespoons) of white flour from the mix and substitute it with an equal amount of gluten powder.
